# TemplateAgent

Starter template for creating a new SwiftSynapse agent. Replace the placeholders with your agent's specification.

## Overview

TemplateAgent provides the directory structure and spec scaffolding for building a new agent in the SwiftSynapse project. It contains placeholder sections in its SPEC.md that define the required shape of an agent specification. No generated code exists for this agent — it serves as a starting point only.

**Platforms:** iOS 26+, macOS 26+, visionOS 2.4+

## Quick Start

1. Copy the `Agents/TemplateAgent/` directory to `Agents/YourAgentName/`.
2. Replace all placeholders in `specs/SPEC.md` with your agent's specification.
3. Update `specs/Overview.md` with generation rules for your agent.
4. Run code generation to produce `Sources/`, `CLI/`, and `Tests/` from your spec.
